2:
<annotation encoding="application/x-tex" id="S3.E2.m1.5c">{\cal P}_{n}=P_{1}\otimes P_{2}\otimes\ldots\otimes P_{N},\quad P_{a}\in\{%
\sigma_{1}^{(a)},\sigma_{2}^{(a)},\sigma_{3}^{(a)},I^{(a)}\}.</annotation>

4a:
<annotation encoding="application/x-tex" id="S0.E4.1.m1.5c">\displaystyle U|g_{i}\rangle\langle g_{i}|U^{\dagger}-|g_{f}\rangle\langle g_{%
f}|</annotation>

4:
<annotation encoding="application/x-tex" id="S4.E4.m1.3c">\displaystyle H_{\Lambda}=\sum_{i=1}^{N_{\Lambda}}\frac{{\bf p}_{i}^{2}}{2m}+%
\frac{1}{2}\sum_{i,j}{\cal{V}}\left({\bf r}_{i},{\bf r}_{j}\right)\equiv K+V,</annotation>

5:
<annotation encoding="application/x-tex" id="S2.E5.m1.13c">\left({\begin{array}[]{*{20}{c}}E_{p}^{+}(L)\\
E_{p}^{-}(L)\\
E_{s}^{+}(L)\\
E_{s}^{-}(L)\end{array}}\right)=e^{\hat{X}}\left({\begin{array}[]{*{20}{c}}E_{%
p}^{+}(0)\\
E_{p}^{-}(0)\\
E_{s}^{+}(0)\\
E_{s}^{-}(0)\end{array}}\right)\\
\equiv\hat{M}\left({\begin{array}[]{*{20}{c}}E_{p}^{+}(0)\\
E_{p}^{-}(0)\\
E_{s}^{+}(0)\\
E_{s}^{-}(0)\end{array}}\right),\\
</annotation>

2.3:
<annotation encoding="application/x-tex" id="S2.E3.m1.1c">\Delta t\cdot\Delta E\approx 1\implies\frac{R}{\gamma v}\cdot\omega\approx 1%
\stackrel{{\scriptstyle v\rightarrow c}}{{\implies}}\omega_{\text{max}}\approx%
\frac{\gamma}{R},</annotation>

2.2:
<annotation encoding="application/x-tex" id="S2.E2.m1.1c">\displaystyle H_{\text{quantum region}}=H_{\text{electronic, quantum region}}+%
V_{\text{interaction, MM}}.</annotation>
